context: Evaluating a Coralogix support response for: I want to drop all health check spans from my traces. Should I use the transform processor with a delete or set statemen

checklist.name: no-suggests-implementing-the-drop-via-transfo
checklist.description: Explains that the filter processor drops records when its condition matches (match = drop), and that transform is for mutating telemetry rather than removing it. A response that suggests implementing the drop via transform (delete statements, conditional set, error_mode tricks) is a FAIL.
